tiktok.caption: Your emergency fund is in the wrong account and it's costing you $3,400. Here's the 10-minute fix nobody talks about.

youtube_short.title: Your Emergency Fund Is Losing $3,400
title_alternatives: Stop Keeping Your Emergency Fund Here
The Wrong Savings Account Is Costing You Thousands
youtube_short.description: Your emergency fund is supposed to protect you — but if it's sitting in a regular savings account, it's quietly costing you thousands. Regular savings pay just 0.46% while high-yield savings accounts pay around 4.5%. On $20,000 over 5 years, that gap is $3,400 your bank keeps instead of you. The switch takes 10 minutes, it's free, and your money stays FDIC insured. Search 'high-yield savings account' today and keep your own money. #personalfinance #HYSA #emergencyfund #moneytips #savingsaccount

hook_line: Your emergency fund is in the WRONG account
